nasb.text: Then on the eighth day he shall bring two turtledoves or two young pigeons to the priest, to the doorway of the tent of meeting.

esv.text: On the eighth day he shall bring two turtledoves or two pigeons to the priest to the entrance of the tent of meeting,

cnv.text: 第八天，他要把兩隻斑鳩，或是兩隻雛鴿，帶到會幕門口交給祭司。

ccb.text: 第八天，他要带两只斑鸠或雏鸽到会幕门口交给祭司。
